$comment: Every remote API this project can touch, per the hackathon transparency rule. The demo itself runs fully offline after setup — no cloud AI APIs anywhere.

remoteApis.purpose: One-time download of the MedPsy GGUF weights (scripts/download-models.sh)
remoteApis.dataSent: nothing beyond the HTTP download request

remoteApis.purpose: First loadModel() of built-in models (Qwen3-1.7B, EmbeddingGemma, SmolVLA) downloads weights through QVAC's own distributed registry into the local cache
remoteApis.dataSent: blob requests on the P2P registry; no user data

remoteApis.purpose: P2P delegated inference between our own provider and consumer processes (both run on this machine; disclosed honestly — see README P2P section)
remoteApis.phase: runtime, only when the optional provider is running
remoteApis.dataSent: DHT routing + the delegated inference payloads between our two processes

remoteApis.purpose: OPTIONAL settlement of netted session balances on Tether's Plasma testnet. Off by default (PLASMA_MODE=off); the demo and all payments work fully offline on the local ledger
remoteApis.dataSent: a settlement transaction (aggregate amounts, no prompts or health data)

cloudAiApis: none — all inference, embeddings, RAG, and (optional) VLA run on-device through the QVAC SDK
